summary: 8 hand-authored cross-resource novel commands: emails to/timeline, audiences inventory, contacts where, broadcasts performance, domains health, deliverability summary, api-keys rotation.
reason: Resend's API is one-shot per resource — there is no aggregate endpoint for recipient timelines, per-audience rollups, cross-audience contact lookup, broadcast performance trends, or deliverability summaries. Every command in this patch reads from the local SQLite store populated by sync; all are read-only and surface in MCP via Cobra-tree mirror. Spec-level patches (x-mcp Cloudflare orchestration + x-auth-env-vars: RESEND_API_KEY) were applied to the upstream OpenAPI before generation; they're not source patches because the generator consumed them at ingest time.
